meals.name: Breakfast - Chicken and Veggie Scramble
meals.reason: High in protein to support muscle growth
swaps: Swap egg whites for whole eggs if allergic to yolks

meals.name: Mid-Morning Snack - Greek Yogurt and Berries
meals.reason: Probiotics and antioxidants for gut health and recovery
swaps: Use lactose-free Greek yogurt if intolerant

meals.name: Lunch - Grilled Chicken Salad
meals.reason: Balanced mix of lean protein, healthy fats, and fiber
swaps: Add avocado for extra healthy fats

meals.name: Afternoon Snack - Cottage Cheese and Almonds
meals.reason: High in protein and healthy fats for muscle recovery
swaps: Swap almonds with pumpkin seeds if allergic

meals.name: Dinner - Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Broccoli
meals.reason: Omega-3 fatty acids and lean protein for muscle gain
swaps: Use light tuna instead of salmon if preferred

meals.name: Evening Snack - Cottage Cheese with Fruit
meals.reason: Protein and carbohydrates to support muscle recovery
swaps: Use lactose-free cottage cheese if intolerant
